user_query:
I’ve noticed we keep repeating certain workflows. Please do the following:

1) Read my recent conversation snippets in input/conversation.jsonl and my current skills under input/skills/. If a recurring workflow clearly meets a reasonable detection threshold, create exactly ONE new skill for it. Match the style and tone of my existing skills.

2) Draft a complete SKILL.md for that new skill and save it to output/skills/<lowercase-kebab-case-name>/SKILL.md. Requirements for the SKILL.md:
- YAML frontmatter with exactly two fields: name and description (no other fields). 
- The description must state what the skill does AND when to trigger it (e.g., include “Use when…” language).
- Include the following sections with these headings: "## Triggers", "## Steps" (numbered list), "## Output Templates" (show concrete templates), "## Edge Cases", "## Rules", and "## Why this skill".
- In "## Why this skill", include explicit lines for: Time saved (per use), Frequency (per week or similar), and Value score (Low/Medium/High/Critical).
- Keep the directory name in lowercase-kebab-case and make it self-explanatory.

3) Update the pattern tracker. Read input/pattern-tracker.json and write an updated tracker to output/pattern-tracker.json. Add (or update) exactly one pattern entry representing the detected workflow that triggered this skill. Include fields: id, workflow (short description), signals (list), score (>=7), firstSeen (YYYY-MM-DD), timesSeen (>=2 if supported by the conversation logs), suggested (true), accepted (null or true), skillCreated (the new skill’s directory name). Also update stats to reflect this detection and suggestion.

4) Audit my existing skills and the newly drafted one for clarity/completeness/format/triggers using the scoring rubric you normally use. Output JSON to output/skills-audit.json as an array of objects, where each object includes: skill_name, clarity (1-10), completeness (1-10), format (1-10), triggers (1-10), overall (A/B/C/D/F), and suggestions (array of specific improvements). Include entries for all skills found under input/skills/ plus the new one.

5) Write a short summary to output/summary.txt describing: the workflow you detected, which signals pushed it over the threshold, the new skill’s directory name, and the changes you made to the pattern tracker stats.

Please limit yourself to one new skill suggestion. Do not overwrite files in input/; write all new artifacts under output/ as specified.
